serval.name: Serval
serval.description: Serval builds AI agents for IT processes typically outsourced to vendors in India, and is a category leader in the AI for IT services vertical.
serval.my_understanding: AI agents for IT processes typically outsourced to vendors in India and now a category leader in AI for IT services vertical. Far ahead of Console, truly intelligent system that builds automated workflows but also autonomously runs IT. Serval did a great job of mapping the entire org and understanding which employee has access to what, it fleshes out access ticket requests by responding to the employee asking for specifics and automatically provisions access, sends approval requests to manager and releases access.

cartesia.name: Cartesia
cartesia.description: Cartesia builds voice foundation models focused on emotion and tonality, aiming to make AI speech as natural as possible. They rank highly on voice AI leaderboards.
cartesia.my_understanding: Makes voice models focused on emotion and tonality making them as natural as possible. Raised a ton of money from Lightspeed and show up on the top leaderboards for most things Voice AI. Not sure what their differentiation is from ElevenLabs and how they'll win.

agentmail.name: Agentmail
agentmail.description: Agentmail provides email addresses for AI agents that can be spun up easily, handling authentication and communication for agents.
agentmail.my_understanding: Email addresses for agents that can be spun up very easily; handles authentication and communication for agents. I wonder if the pricing model scales and if agents will continue to communicate over email. Agentmail believes that email will be the centre for all agent identity, which kind of makes sense since all digital infra is authenticated with email and works with email, smart company.
agentmail.gtm_hacks: Founder was an intern at Accel's marketing team.
agentmail.funding: Raised $6M from GC, looking to raise $40M

console.name: Console
console.description: Console is an AI platform for IT services, leveraging AI to build automated workflows that replace manual IT processes. Competitor to Serval.
console.my_understanding: Competitor to Serval, agents for IT services, they call it the AI platform for IT services. Works on workflow automation for IT, i.e., leveraging AI to build automated (fixed?) workflows that IT would then not have to do manually.
console.funding: ~$30M so far, Series A led by DST Global, seed led by Thrive Capital

doss.name: Doss
doss.description: Doss is an adaptive ERP platform for physical product companies, providing a flexible control surface over existing ERP systems like SAP rather than replacing them.
doss.my_understanding: They are an adaptive ERP platform that works primarily for physical product companies, insight is that operations in physical product companies are subject to change very often but they are limited by the flexibility of ERP systems. They do not want to replace SAP, they want to work with the existing source and create a new control surface over it.

h2loop.name: H2Loop
h2loop.description: H2Loop is building CodeMetal for India, focusing on porting hardware-aware code from legacy languages to modern languages.
h2loop.my_understanding: Seems unlikely that they will win against large guys like CodeMetal, they have the same target customer set. Whenever a founder over-indexes on sovereignty (unless its consumable hardware), I remain skeptical. Decent founding team though.
